channel.title: Mann Ki Baat Hindi
channel.description: Unofficial Hindi feed for Mann Ki Baat
channel.itunes:author: PMO India
channel.itunes:summary: Hindi editions of Mann Ki Baat

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 118th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi addresses the nation through his Radio Address, Mann Ki Baat. This month's episode sees citizens from various corners of the nation addressing their questions and suggestions to PM Modi.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi #modi
MKB Chapters
00:00 Introduction
1:31 Republic Day
6:44 National voter’s day
8:31 Mahakumbh
13:20 Space-tech start-up
17:18 Assam’s ‘Hathi Bandhu’
19:39 Tiger Reserves
20:15 Swami Vivekanand
21:20 StartUp India
23:29 Deepak Nabam Ji
24:47 K. Hindumbi Ji and K.G. Mohammed Ji
25:53 Virgin coconut oil
26:53 Netaji Subhas Bose
30:35 Conclusion
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F
Follow us to stay updated: ► Catch Mann Ki Baat Episodes on soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/narendramodi/sets ► Catch Mann Ki Baat Episodes on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/6UIkjKT79fYTrOukE6fURn ► Download the NM App: http://nm4.in/dnldapp ► Like us on Facebook: https://facebook.com/narendramodi ► Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/narendramodi ► Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/narendramodi

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 119th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi highlighted ISRO’s 100th launch, India’s AI advancements and growing women’s contributions in various fields. He announced a special Women’s Day social media initiative. He raised awareness about obesity, lauded India’s sports achievements and discussed wildlife conservation efforts. PM Modi also wished students success in their exams and encouraged them to stay stress-free.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
MKB Chapters
00:00 Introduction
1:38 ISRO
4:09 National Science Day
5:10 Artificial Intelligence
7:06 Women’s Day
11:58 Sports
15:30 Fight Against Obesity
24:11 Biodiversity
28:39 PPC
31:01 Conclusion
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 121st Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi condemned the heinous terrorist attack in Pahalgam, expressing deep anger and assuring that the perpetrators would face the harshest response. The PM paid tributes and recalled Dr. K. Kasturirangan’s contributions towards the space and education sectors. He also highlighted India’s global leadership in science, innovation and humanitarian efforts.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
MKB Chapters
00:00 Introduction
0:47 Pahalgam Terror Attack
4:18 Dr. Kasturirangan
6:11 Space Sector
10:19 Operation Brahma
13:16 Ethiopia, Afghanistan, Nepal
15:16 SACHET App
16:42 Science and innovation
18:48 Ek Ped Maa Ke Naam
21:38 Farming part
24:53 Bihar and Freedom movements
28:56 Conclusion
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 122nd Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi hailed the valour displayed by our forces during Operation Sindoor that has made every Indian proud. He shared insights on a range of engaging topics, including a village in Maharashtra where a bus has reached for the first time, increasing population of lions, Sikkim’s traditional weaving, and Drone Didis. The PM also highlighted honey production and the importance of saving honeybees.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
MKB Chapters
00:00 Introduction
00:27 Operation Sindoor
5:21 Maoism
8:00 Lions
10:22 Sikkim
12:52 Uttarakhand
14:49 Drone Didis
16:05 Yoga Day
19:09 Sugar Board
20:12 Swachhata
21:51 Paper Waste and recycling
23:34 Khelo India
25:28 Honeybees
29:53 Conclusion
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 123rd Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke about the success of International Day of Yoga and enthusiastic participation of the people in the yoga events all over the world. He shared insights on a range of engaging topics, including the holy Yatras undertaken by pilgrims, imposition of Emergency, success of Women from Self Help Groups and importance of nature protection. The PM highlighted the holy relics of Bhagwan Buddha venerated in Vietnam that were taken from India.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
MKB Chapters
00:00 Introduction
00:35 Yoga
3:35 Pilgrimage
6:02 WHO and ILO
9:43 Emergency
14:04 Bodoland
16:42 Obesity
17:13 Eri Silk
20:01 Telangana Women Effort
21:13 Karnataka Women Effort
21:53 MP Women Effort
22:58 Buddha Relics in Vietnam
25:56 Pune Environment Effort
27:30 Gujarat Environment Effort
28:37 Maharashtra Village Effort
29:29 International Space Centre & Conclusion

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 131st Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
PM Modi Live: In this month’s Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke about his experiences at the India AI Impact Summit held in Delhi. He touched upon many important topics such as Indian-origin cricketers, organ donation, river festivals, digital safety, Pariksha Pe Charcha and more. He highlighted that on 23rd February, 'Rajaji Utsav' will be celebrated at Rashtrapati Bhavan. The PM also paid rich tributes to former Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa ji, noting her deep connection with Nari Shakti.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔 To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F
PM Narendra Modi's other social media platforms: ► Catch Mann Ki Baat Episodes on soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/narendramodi/sets ► Catch Mann Ki Baat Episodes on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/6UIkjKT79fYTrOukE6fURn ► Download the NM App: http://nm4.in/dnldapp ► Like us on Facebook: https://facebook.com/narendramodi ► Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/narendramodi ► Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/narendramodi

item.title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 132nd Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
In this month’s Mann Ki Baat programme, PM Modi spoke about the West Asia conflict and emphasised the need to remain united to overcome the crisis. He appealed to citizens not to be misled by rumours and to rely only on information provided by the government. The PM also touched upon key themes such as the Gyan Bharatam Survey, sports and fitness, water conservation, fish farming and solar power.
#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔 To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F
